parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'create_task', data: { title: 'Onboarding: ' + $json.companyName, description: $json.notification.message, type: 'onboarding', priority: 'high', companyName: $json.companyName, metadata: JSON.stringify({ steps: $json.steps, companyId: $json.companyId }) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'log', data: { level: 'info', message: $json.notification.message, source: 'n8n-onboarding', metadata: JSON.stringify({ companyId: $json.companyId, companyName: $json.companyName, steps: $json.totalSteps }) } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Onboarding initiated for ' + $('ROPA Onboarding Plan').first().json.companyName, plan: { steps: $('ROPA Onboarding Plan').first().json.totalSteps, completed: $('ROPA Onboarding Plan').first().json.completedSteps }, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
